title: Enchanting Table Preview Recipe
description: When Notch was first showing off the Enchanting Table it was made from cobblestone.
body:
# Enchanting Table Preview Recipe

This is just a simple recipe data pack, nothing special.

30 September 2011 Notch showcased the Enchanting Table with 2 different textures main difference still being they were made from cobblestone.

- empty, book, empty
- diamond, cobblestone, diamond
- cobblestone, cobblestone, cobblestone

**Side Note**: The game will most likely tell you that the data pack is out of data depending on the version you are choosing to play but it works just fine 1.13-1.20

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35129755a641f649b7fdda93d6442fc838d8156f.png)

![first showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec31759415a4e69376cb27ef6156a13fba81a548.png)

![second showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fe08aec0b4bae6aefe78f80d0d18be39fd2ec90.png)
